name: get_gamma_comments
description: Lists comment threads on an existing Gamma presentation or document, including their replies. Use this when the user wants to read, review, or summarize the comments or feedback on a Gamma. Requires the Gamma file ID or URL. Results are paginated, oldest activity first; use `after` with the `nextCursor` from a previous response to fetch the next page. Use `updatedSince` (ISO-8601 timestamp) to fetch only threads with activity after a given time.

gammaIdOrUrl.description: The Gamma file ID or a full Gamma URL. Examples: "g5aykcic8ujm71s" or "https://gamma.app/docs/My-Deck-g5aykcic8ujm71s".

limit.description: Maximum number of comment threads to return per page (optional, defaults to 50, max 50)

after.description: Cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page (optional). When paginating, keep the other parameters exactly the same as the call that produced the cursor; changing filters mid-pagination can cause skipped, duplicated, or inconsistent results.

updatedSince.description: ISO-8601 timestamp, e.g. "2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z" (optional). When provided, only comment threads with activity (including new replies) after this timestamp are returned.

includeArchived.description: When true, archived (deleted) comments and replies are included in the results, each carrying an `archived` flag (optional, defaults to false)
